heroHeading: Submit or track a <highlight>complaint</highlight> to the Ministry of Planning and Development.
heroBody: Submit a complaint, receive a reference number, and track progress online.
heroBodyExtended: Our citizen-centered platform ensures transparency and accountability in administrative processes.
heroIllustrationAlt: Isometric illustration of complaint documents being processed into verified outcomes
processSubtitle: A transparent four-step journey from submission to final resolution.

submission.title: Submission
submission.body: Provide details and supporting files for your complaint.

review.title: Review
review.body: MoPD validates and assigns the complaint to an officer.

investigation.title: Investigation
investigation.body: Assigned staff gathers evidence and resolves the issue.

resolution.title: Resolution
resolution.body: Final decision and resolution outcome are communicated.

readyBody: File a new complaint or track an existing case with your reference number.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.body: Your data is protected under the Ethiopian Personal Data Protection Proclamation No. 1321/2024.

tracking.title: Real-time Tracking
tracking.body: Track your complaint status at any time with your unique, secure reference number.

citizenCentered.title: Citizen-Centered
citizenCentered.body: Designed to ensure transparency, fairness, and accountability in administrative processes.

footerDescription: Ministry of Planning and Development (MoPD) Complaint Management System. Building a more responsive administration.
footerDescriptionLine1: Ministry of Planning and Development (MoPD) Complaint Management
footerDescriptionLine2: System. Building a more responsive administration.

phase0Note: Foundation build in progress — staff and admin surfaces ship in later phases.
